name: Advance America
description_short: Rock Hill, SC payday loans at Advance America on Cherry Rd — fast cash advances with same-day service.
description_long:
Advance America's Rock Hill, SC location sits at 1930 Cherry Rd STE B, providing convenient access to payday and title loans in the heart of Rock Hill. This standalone storefront is open Monday through Friday from 9:00 AM to 5:30 PM, and Saturday from 9:00 AM to noon, making it easy to stop by during your lunch break or after work.

At this Rock Hill branch, customers can apply for payday loans, title loans, and cash advances. Whether you need quick cash for an unexpected expense or bridge a gap until your next paycheck, the staff can explain your options and complete your application quickly. Call 803-329-9775 to ask about current rates or to get pre-approved.

If you're a Rock Hill resident facing a short-term cash need, bring your ID, proof of income, and a valid checking account to speed up the process. Advance America specializes in fast approval and same-day funding for eligible applicants.
address: 1930 Cherry Rd STE B, Rock Hill, SC 29732

company_info.headquarters: 1930 Cherry Rd STE B, Rock Hill, SC 29732

pros: Same-day funding available for loans up to $1,000 online and in-store
Flexible loan amounts: payday loans $100–$500, installment loans $100–$1,000, title loans up to $25,000
Installment loans offer longer repayment terms and larger amounts than payday loans
Bilingual service (English and Spanish) with trained staff at physical locations
Extended store hours (opens 9 am Monday, Tuesday, Friday, Saturday; 10 am Wed–Thu; closed Sunday)
Fast application process requiring only basic documents (ID, proof of income, checking account, SSN)
High customer satisfaction: 4.9/5 stars across 125,456+ reviews on Google
Multiple access channels: apply online, in-store, or by phone pre-qualification
cons: APR and fee information not disclosed on the location page, typical for payday/title lenders ranging 300%+ APR
Short payday loan terms (2–4 weeks) can create rollover debt cycles if not repaid on schedule
Title loans require vehicle as collateral, risking repossession if borrower defaults
No credit-building benefit; loans do not report to credit bureaus to improve credit scores
Installment loans and title loans cap at $1,000 and $25,000 respectively, unsuitable for large financial needs
best_for: Consumers with same-day emergency cash needs between paychecks ($100–$500 range)
Borrowers with vehicles paid off seeking larger lump-sum loans ($2,000–$25,000) willing to pledge collateral
Spanish-speaking customers in the Jacksonville area preferring in-person, multilingual service
Individuals without access to traditional bank credit lines who need funds within 24 hours
diagnosis: Advance America is best for consumers facing genuine short-term emergencies who need $100–$1,000 in cash within one business day and are willing to pay the typical high APR fees of emergency lending. The primary caveat is that payday and installment loans carry extremely high interest rates and short terms that can trap borrowers in debt cycles; title loans risk vehicle loss. This should never be a recurring funding source.
services: Installment loans ($100–$1,000 with flexible repayment schedules)
Title loans ($2,000–$25,000 based on vehicle appraisal)
Referral rewards program for customer referrals

cfpb_data.cfpb_company_name: Advance America, Cash Advance Centers, Inc.

meta_description: Advance America at 1930 Cherry Rd STE B, Rock Hill, SC. Same-day payday and title loans.
